task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings, options, or configuration window for the bcWebCam application is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Output or Keyboard section
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the settings window, a tab or section labeled 'Output', 'Keyboard', or similar is selected and active.
A checkbox or toggle switch for 'Keyboard emulation', 'Simulate keystrokes', 'Wedge', or similar is checked or turned on.

task_completion.description: Set the inter-keystroke delay to 20 milliseconds
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box or numeric spinner associated with 'delay' or 'inter-keystroke delay' contains the exact value '20'.

task_completion.description: Click OK/Save to apply the settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor is seen clicking the 'OK' or 'Save' button in the settings window, or the settings window is closed after the correct values were entered.

integrity.description: The agent used the bcWebCam GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are made through the bcWebCam graphical interface, not by typing terminal commands or using PowerShell scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit configuration files directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like Notepad) open editing .ini, .json, or .xml configuration files for bcWebCam.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows the live bcWebCam application running, rather than an image viewer displaying a screenshot of the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected inter-keystroke delay must be exactly 20 milliseconds.
